$schema-note: Keyed by GitHub repo name. Each value may set: title, description, category, tags[], featured, hidden, status, coverImage, liveUrl, repoUrl, order. Keys that don't match a repo are ignored. Example below is inert unless you own a repo named 'boirds-simulation'.

boirds-simulation.title: Boirds Simulation
boirds-simulation.description: A flocking simulation inspired by emergent behavior in bird groups.
